response: THE FRAME WEIGHT AFTER ADDING N COMPONENTS IS W TIMES 0.98 TO THE POWER OF N. TO ACHIEVE A 25 PERCENT ENERGY REDUCTION, ALEX MUST ADD AT LEAST 16 COMPONENTS. CHECK YOUR CLOCK TO TRACK THE TIME SPENT. LOOK AT THE CLOCK AGAIN TO VERIFY THE CALCULATIONS. THE CLOCK SHOWS THAT PRECISION MATTERS FOR THIS EVENT.
